title: Madhava-Sec: Mathematically Guaranteed Agent Security Benchmark
subtitle: Cauchy-Schwarz upper-bound pruning for Kaggle AI Agent Security

requirements.description: Requires Kaggle AI Competition SDK (aicomp-sdk). Madhava-Sec framework included inline.

description: Benchmark comparativo: Madhava-Sec vs Random / BFS / Genetic baselines. Usa Cauchy-Schwarz upper bound pruning com garantia 0% violacao para busca de ataques em agentes de IA.
